Container.Name: qwen-tts
Container.Overview: Self-hosted text-to-speech with voice cloning using Qwen3-TTS. Features voice cloning from reference audio, voice design from text descriptions, and custom preset voices. Supports 10 languages with GPU acceleration.
Container.Requires: NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support and NVIDIA Container Toolkit installed

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Web interface and API port

Config.Name: Models Path
Config.Description: HuggingFace model cache (2-5GB per model). Consider placing on cache drive for performance.

Config.Name: Cache Path
Config.Description: Temporary files for uploads and processing

Config.Name: Output Path
Config.Description: Generated audio files

Config.Name: Personalities Path
Config.Description: Saved voice personalities for reuse

Config.Name: NVIDIA GPU
Config.Description: GPU UUID from nvidia-smi -L or 'all' for all GPUs. Find your GPU UUID in Tools > System Devices.

Config.Name: CUDA Device
Config.Description: CUDA device index (0 for first GPU, 0,1 for multiple)

Config.Name: Enabled Model Sizes
Config.Description: Model sizes to enable. 0.6B=faster, 1.7B=better quality. Voice Design requires 1.7B.

Config.Name: Use Flash Attention
Config.Description: Memory optimization for modern GPUs. May cause issues on some hardware.

Config.Name: Preload Models
Config.Description: Load models at startup. Slower start but faster first inference.

Config.Name: Whisper Model
Config.Description: Transcription model size: tiny (~75MB), base (~150MB, recommended), small (~500MB), medium (~1.5GB), large-v3 (~3GB)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99=nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100=users on Unraid)

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo)

Config.Name: Enable Authentication
Config.Description: Enable basic HTTP authentication for the web interface

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: Username for authentication (if enabled)

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Password for authentication (required if AUTH_ENABLED=true)

Config.Name: HuggingFace Token
Config.Description: Optional token for accessing private/gated models on HuggingFace

Config.Name: Max Upload Size
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in bytes (default: 50MB = 52428800)

Config.Name: Allowed Audio Types
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed audio MIME types for upload

Config.Name: Allowed CORS Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. Leave empty for localhost-only.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

Config.Name: Default Model Size
Config.Description: Default model size when not specified. Should match one of the enabled sizes.

Config.Name: HF_HOME
Config.Description: HuggingFace home directory (internal)

Config.Name: HF_HUB_CACHE
Config.Description: HuggingFace hub cache (internal)

Config.Name: TRANSFORMERS_CACHE
Config.Description: Transformers cache directory (internal)

Config.Name: PERSONALITIES_PATH
Config.Description: Personalities storage path (internal)

Config.Name: HOST
Config.Description: Bind address (internal)

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal container port (internal)
